items.headline: Chelsea Clinton runs Boston Marathon in personal best time
items.description: With her parents, Bill and Hillary Clinton, waiting at the finish line to congratulate her, former first daughter Chelsea Clinton, 46, the vice chair of the Clinton Foundation, finished the Boston Marathon on Monday in 3 hours, 40 minutes, 52 seconds.

items.headline: Rockets' Kevin Durant game-time decision for Game 2
items.description: Rockets star Kevin Durant went through around half of Houston's practice on Monday and will be a game-time decision for Game 2 on Tuesday.

items.headline: West Ham cling to safety in draw with Crystal Palace
items.description: West Ham United secured a massive point in their relegation battle after playing out a goalless draw with Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park, also sealing Wolves' relegation to the Championship.

items.headline: 2025-26 NBA championship odds: Pistons' odds fall after Game 1 loss; SGA, Wemby faves for Finals MVP
items.description: Three teams have emerged as the heavy favorites to win the NBA Finals, and Detroit's title odds took a hit after the Game 1 loss to Orlando.

items.headline: Tilak Varma rides 45-ball rollercoaster to IPL glory
items.description: From 19 off 22 balls to equalling the record for MI's fastest century, this was one wild ride

items.headline: Just as he promised, Ivan Toney fires Al Ahli into AFC Champions League Elite final
items.description: With just his second goal of the campaign, Ivan Toney has fired Al Ahli into the AFC Champions League Elite final.

items.headline: Cincinnati Bengals 2026 NFL draft picks, biggest needs
items.description: Let's take a closer look at each of the Bengals' 2026 draft picks.

items.headline: New York Giants 2026 NFL draft picks, biggest needs
items.description: Let's take a closer look at each of the Giants' 2026 draft picks.

items.headline: Wolves relegated from the Premier League as West Ham, Crystal Palace draw
items.description: Wolverhampton Wanderers have officially been relegated from the Premier League.

items.headline: Florida center Rueben Chinyelu to test NBA draft waters
items.description: Florida center Rueben Chinyelu, ranked No. 57 on ESPN's big board, is entering the NBA draft while maintaining his college eligibility.

items.headline: Carlos Alcaraz, Aryna Sabalenka, PSG win top Laureus awards
items.description: Tennis players Carlos Alcaraz and Aryna Sabalenka were named Sportsman and Sportswoman of the Year at the Laureus awards on Monday while Paris Saint-Germain was the Team of the Year.

items.headline: Carlos Alcaraz waits on wrist tests as French Open awaits
items.description: Defending two-time champion Carlos Alcaraz has put his participation at the French Open in doubt because of a right wrist injury, and medical tests in the next few days will determine whether Alcaraz will be able to play in the Grand Slam tournament.

items.headline: Storm's Ezi Magbegor to miss start of season with foot injury
items.description: Storm standout Ezi Magbegor will miss the beginning of the WNBA season due to a right foot injury that she suffered while playing for Australian national team.

items.headline: Vissel Kobe fall short again as Al Ahli close in on AFC Champions League Elite title defence
items.description: Al Ahli are through to a second consecutive AFC Champions League Elite final after coming from behind to beat Vissel Kobe 2-1.

items.headline: Sources: Oilers expect Leon Draisaitl to return for Game 1
items.description: Edmonton Oilers star center Leon Draisaitl, who has not played since March 15 after suffering a lower-body injury, is expected to return for Game 1 of the Stanley Cup playoffs against the Anaheim Ducks on Monday night, sources told ESPN's Emily Kaplan.
